mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.student_id, g.course_id, g.course_name, g.teacher_id, g.attendance_score, g.homework_score, g.quiz_score, g.exam_score, g.final_score, g.grade_level, g.gpa, g.credit_earned, g.is_pass, g.published_time, g.created_time FROM grade g WHERE g.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY g.final_score DESC, g.id ASC

SELECT g.id, g.student_id, g.course_id, g.course_name, g.teacher_id, g.attendance_score, g.homework_score, g.quiz_score, g.exam_score, g.final_score, g.grade_level, g.gpa, g.credit_earned, g.is_pass, g.published_time, g.created_time FROM grade g WHERE g.course_id = #{courseId} AND g.student_id = #{studentId} AND g.published_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY g.published_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(credit_earned), 0) FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_pass = 1 AND published_time IS NOT NULL

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(credit_earned) > 0 THEN SUM(gpa * credit_earned) / SUM(credit_earned) ELSE 0 END AS average_gpa FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_pass = 1 AND published_time IS NOT NULL
SELECT grade_level AS gradeLevel, COUNT(*) AS count FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND published_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY grade_level ORDER BY grade_level

SELECT course_id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, final_score AS finalScore, grade_level AS gradeLevel, published_time AS publishedTime FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND published_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY published_time ASC

SELECT course_id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, credit_earned AS creditEarned, grade_level AS gradeLevel FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_pass = 1 AND published_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY published_time DESC

SELECT course_id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, grade_level AS gradeLevel, gpa, credit_earned AS creditEarned FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_pass = 1 AND published_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY published_time DESC

SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(published_time), '年', IF(MONTH(published_time) <= 6, '上学期', '下学期')) AS semester, COALESCE(SUM(credit_earned), 0) AS totalCredits, COUNT(*) AS courseCount FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_pass = 1 AND published_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CONCAT(YEAR(published_time), '年', IF(MONTH(published_time) <= 6, '上学期', '下学期')) ORDER BY MIN(published_time)

SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(published_time), '年', IF(MONTH(published_time) <= 6, '上学期', '下学期')) AS period, CASE WHEN SUM(credit_earned) > 0 THEN SUM(gpa * credit_earned) / SUM(credit_earned) ELSE 0 END AS gpa FROM grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_pass = 1 AND published_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CONCAT(YEAR(published_time), '年', IF(MONTH(published_time) <= 6, '上学期', '下学期')) ORDER BY MIN(published_time)

SELECT id, student_id, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, attendance_score, homework_score, quiz_score, exam_score, final_score, grade_level, gpa, credit_earned, is_pass, published_time, published_by, created_time, updated_time FROM grade WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, student_id, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, attendance_score, homework_score, quiz_score, exam_score, final_score, grade_level, gpa, credit_earned, is_pass, published_time, published_by, created_time, updated_time FROM grade WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE grade SET published_time = NULL, published_by = NULL WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN g.is_pass = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS passCount, COALESCE(AVG(g.final_score), 0) AS averageScore, COALESCE(MAX(g.final_score), 0) AS maxScore, COALESCE(MIN(g.final_score), 0) AS minScore FROM grade g WHERE g.course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT g.grade_level AS gradeLevel, COUNT(*) AS count FROM grade g WHERE g.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY g.grade_level

SELECT CASE WHEN g.final_score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN g.final_score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN g.final_score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN g.final_score >= 60 THEN '60-69' ELSE '0-59' END AS scoreRange, COUNT(*) AS count FROM grade g WHERE g.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY CASE WHEN g.final_score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN g.final_score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN g.final_score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN g.final_score >= 60 THEN '60-69' ELSE '0-59' END
